testsuite.name: com.gmaingret.outlinergod.ui.screen.bookmarks.BookmarkListViewModelTest

testcase.name: softDeleteBookmark calls dao with correct id and hlc
loadBookmarks emits Empty when no bookmarks
onBookmarkTapped with document type posts NavigateToDocument
onBookmarkTapped with node type posts NavigateToNodeEditor
